text: Lord, hear my prayer and do not hide Yourself from my plea. Thank You that I can bring every burden before You.
Father, when my thoughts are troubled and my heart is overwhelmed, help me find peace in Your presence.
Lord, when opposition or pressure surrounds me, strengthen my faith and help me trust You completely.
Father, You know every fear within my heart. Draw near to me and give me courage.
Lord, when anxiety overwhelms me, remind me that You are my refuge and my strength.
Father, there are times I want to run away from difficulties. Help me find safety and rest in You instead.
Lord, thank You that Your presence follows me wherever I go. Keep me close to You.
Father, be my shelter during life's storms and protect me with Your peace.
Lord, bring wisdom, order, and truth where there is confusion and conflict.
Father, protect my heart from becoming consumed by negativity, fear, or division.
Lord, help me remain faithful to You even when surrounded by corruption or wrongdoing.
Father, when I experience hurt from others, help me respond with grace and wisdom.
Lord, You understand the pain of broken relationships. Bring healing and restoration to my heart.
Father, thank You for the gift of fellowship and community. Help me value relationships that honor You.
Lord, protect me from evil influences and keep my heart firmly grounded in Your truth.
Father, I call upon You because You are my Savior and Deliverer. Thank You for hearing me.
Lord, help me bring every concern to You in prayer throughout the day.
Father, thank You for giving peace to those who trust in You. Strengthen my confidence in Your care.
Lord, You are eternal and unchanging. Help me trust Your wisdom and Your timing.
Father, teach me to walk with integrity and faithfulness in all my relationships.
Lord, give me discernment and wisdom when dealing with words that sound good but do not reflect truth.
Father, I cast my burdens upon You. Thank You for sustaining me and caring for every detail of my life.
Lord, help me trust You completely and walk faithfully in Your ways each day.
